prestazioni: Engine swap to a **KF-ZE (1.8L V6, 60° DOHC, 24V)** from the Mazda MX-3, mated to a **HKS GT-SS turbo kit** (Garrett GT2860RS-5 turbo, 300-cell front-mount intercooler, HKS SSQV blow-off valve) with a **custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust (Fujitsubo Giken)** and **HKS Hi-Power 4-2-1 headers** for optimized scavenging. ECU reflash via **Haltech Elite 1500** with custom maps for 98 RON fuel and **NGK Iridium IX (LFR6AIX-11) spark plugs** for high-RPM stability.

Full **Tein Flex Z coilovers (SCRUM-specific valving)** with **Cusco 22mm front / 20mm rear sway bars** and **SuperPro poly bushings (front control arms, subframe, and differential mounts)** to eliminate compliance under hard cornering. Braking upgraded to **Endless CC-R6 rotors (256mm front, 240mm rear)** with **Project Mu 999 pads** and **Goodridge braided stainless steel brake lines** for fade resistance.

Drivetrain reinforcement with a **Cusco 1.5-way LSD (80% lockup)** in the **F6A (660cc 3-cylinder turbo) or F8A (800cc 3-cylinder turbo) transmission**, paired with a **Spec Stage 3+ clutch (6-puck cerametallic)** and **ACT heavy-duty flywheel**. Final drive ratio changed to **4.555:1 (OEM Mazda Carol rear diff)** for quicker acceleration, with **Toyo R888R tires (185/55R15)** on **Rays Gram Lights 57CR (15x6.5 +38 offset)** for maximum mechanical grip.
estetica: **Liberty Walk LB Works Scrum-specific widebody kit** (FRP construction, bolt-on fender flares, and custom rear diffuser) with **Seibon carbon fiber hood (vented, 30% weight reduction)** and **RE Amemiya GT-II rear wing (200mm chord, 3-position adjustable)** for downforce at speed. Painted in **Mazda Racing Silver (46G) with custom Nismo-style red/black accents** and **3M 1080 gloss black vinyl roof wrap**.

**OEM Mazda Carol front bumper lip (JDM-spec, unpainted carbon fiber)** with **C-West fog light deletes** and **Morimoto XB LED headlights (3000K, projector-style)** for modernized lighting. Side skirts replaced with **Vertex Scrum-specific side steps (aluminum, 20mm lower)** and **JDM Mazda Carol door mirrors (painted body color)** for a sleeper aesthetic.

**Bride Zeta III (Scrum-specific mounting brackets)** with **Takata Drift II 4-point harnesses** and **NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel (330mm, suede)**. Interior stripped with **Recaro SRD (Kei-car spec, fixed-back)** and **Defi BF Advance gauges (oil temp, oil pressure, boost)** mounted on a **custom A-pillar pod (carbon fiber, 3D-printed brackets)**. Sound system upgraded to **Alpine X-S65C component speakers** with a **JL Audio 500/1v2 subwoofer (custom sealed enclosure under passenger seat)**.
